task_objective: Update ydata-like theme to support interaction plots
design_decisions: Implemented InteractionsSection component in ydata-like template
Implemented SVG-based ScatterPlot component with scaling and axes
Added interaction plot to the main report layout and navigation
Used Tailwind CSS for styling to match the existing ydata-like theme
results: Interaction plots are now functional in the ydata-like theme. Users can select any pair of numeric variables to see a scatter plot.
